# Vendored Rcpp source provenance

- Package: Rcpp
- Version: 1.1.2
- Upstream: Comprehensive R Archive Network (CRAN)
- Source URL: `https://cran.r-project.org/src/contrib/Rcpp_1.1.2.tar.gz`
- Upstream publication date: 2026-07-05
- Downloaded: 2026-07-23
- SHA-256:
  `2746cf2fb188e5f0a84dbf5c8f68915b54564ed33e5754572f174e7b32e7f4f3`
- License: GPL (>= 2), as recorded in the source archive's `DESCRIPTION`;
  the archive contains the upstream license metadata and complete source.

The archive is stored without modification as
`third_party/Rcpp_1.1.2.tar.gz`. It exists so the R package can be installed
from release media with networking disabled. It is not loaded by the CMake,
Python, or Stata builds.
